title: QIAseq FastSelect Normalization
author: Opentrons
description: With this Protocol you can Normalize RNA samples using RNA Concentration, Goal Concentration, Total Volume. This Normalization is the normalization protocol to preceed the QIAseq FastSelect and QIAsec FastSelect 5s , 16S and 23S.
steps_raw: With this Protocol you can Normalize RNA samples using RNA Concentration, Goal Concentration, Total Volume. This Normalization is the normalization protocol to preceed the QIAseq FastSelect and QIAsec FastSelect 5s , 16S and 23S.
Load CSV into the slot above, With the Columns being RNA Concentration, Goal Concentration and Total Goal Volume
The Source Plate will be loaded onto the Temperature module on slot 10
The Dilution Plate will be loaded onto the Temperature module on slot 7
materials_raw: Applied Biosystems Enduraplate 96 Aluminum Block 220 µL
Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Bio-Rad Well Plate 200 µL
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
